subcodes.first_line: O Haydar-'Alí! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The Book of Certitude hath, in accordance with divine command, been made to conform and be corrected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر قبل علی علیک بهائی و عنایتی کتاب ایقان حسب الامر بمطابقه و تصحیح آن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @development of capacity and readiness, @love of God, @high station of the true believer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat]
